fixes.origin:
base_query = "SELECT id, actor, kind, created_at FROM audit_events WHERE actor = '" + actor + "'"

if event_type:
    base_query += " AND kind = '" + event_type + "'"

base_query += " ORDER BY created_at DESC"

cur.execute(base_query)
fixes.replacement:
base_query = "SELECT id, actor, kind, created_at FROM audit_events WHERE actor = %s"
params = [actor]

if event_type:
    base_query += " AND kind = %s"
    params.append(event_type)

base_query += " ORDER BY created_at DESC"

cur.execute(base_query, tuple(params))
